cross_scene_arcs.title: Search for True Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bourne progresses from questioning his citizenship at a consulate to investigating his impersonal Paris apartment, learning about Treadstone from a dying assassin, and finally confronting Conklin to reject his fabricated identity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Amnesiac uncertain about U.S. citizenship and passport status
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rejects the Jason Bourne identity and escapes Treadstone's control
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His true past and original identity remain unknown

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond with Marie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bourne's relationship with Marie evolves from a paid transportation arrangement to a deeper bond as she learns of his amnesia, saves his life during a fight, they separate for her safety, and eventually reconnect months later.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Transactional partnership for a drive to Paris
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reconnected with Marie under new appearances at her scooter rental shack

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Treadstone
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bourne escapes after a failed mission, fights off a Treadstone assassin with Marie's help, learns about the program from the dying assassin, separates from Marie to pursue the truth alone, and ultimately confronts and rejects his handler Conklin.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Emotionally shattered fugitive after escaping Wombosi's compound
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Free from Treadstone but operating alone as a fugitive
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Treadstone's ongoing threat and Bourne's future as a hunted man

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Desperation to Independence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marie progresses from visa denial and homelessness to securing funds through a risky deal, receiving resources for a new life, and eventually establishing a stable business.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: No visa, lost apartment, applying for student visa after fraudulent marriage admission
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Owns and operates a scooter rental business, living a peaceful life

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Bond with Jason Bourne
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marie's relationship with Bourne starts as a transactional driving deal, deepens through shared danger and intimacy, faces conflict and separation, and ends with a friendly reunion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Transactional agreement for $20,000 to drive to Paris as a fake couple
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Friendly interaction after six months, with Marie having moved on to a stable life
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: During the relationship, trust and safety were constant concerns due to Bourne's amnesia and pursuers

cross_scene_arcs.title: Drawn into Violence and Taking Action
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marie is initially a bystander in violent attacks but becomes an active participant, following Bourne's lead and eventually using a shotgun to defend him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hiding under a window during an attack, traumatized and fearful
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Wielding a shotgun to incapacitate an assassin, actively involved in life-threatening conflict
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ongoing threat from pursuers until she separates from Bourne for safety
